summary: Integrated ADR 0273 on synchronized main release 0.177.77 by replaying exact-main public endpoint admission control across the shared edge and route-ledger publication paths, re-verifying direct HTTP and TLS evidence, and establishing platform version 0.130.52 without introducing new public DNS or certificate drift.

verification.check: Latest origin/main baseline and protected release cut
verification.observed: `git fetch origin --prune` confirmed the synchronized mainline baseline at commit `90c3b26f93fbfe6ffdaecd74fdc422cfcf10281f`; the exact-main ADR 0273 replay source was commit `e3de9561c1e55a190be8f20176a68c9c2fe97e39` on top of that head, and the protected release cut advanced repository version `0.177.76` to `0.177.77` while carrying platform version `0.130.52` for this public-endpoint admission rollout.

`uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_subdomain_exposure_audit.py tests/test_edge_publication_makefile.py tests/test_validate_repo_cache.py -q` returned `35 passed`; `./scripts/validate_repo.sh data-models agent-standards generated-docs generated-portals` passed; and the dependency-graph generator check `uv run --with jsonschema --with pyyaml python scripts/validate_dependency_graph.py >/dev/null && uv run --with jsonschema python scripts/generate_dependency_diagram.py --check >/dev/null && uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/generate_diagrams.py --check >/dev/null` returned `OK` on the integrated latest-main tree.

From release commit `e3de9561c1e55a190be8f20176a68c9c2fe97e39` on `origin/main` baseline `90c3b26f93fbfe6ffdaecd74fdc422cfcf10281f`, `make route-dns-assertion-ledger env=production` completed successfully with final recap `localhost : ok=56 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=24 rescued=0 ignored=0`, proving the new admission gate keeps the already-aligned public DNS state idempotent on the latest main release.

From release commit `e3de9561c1e55a190be8f20176a68c9c2fe97e39` on `origin/main` baseline `90c3b26f93fbfe6ffdaecd74fdc422cfcf10281f`, `make configure-edge-publication env=production` completed successfully with final recap `nginx-lv3 : ok=61 changed=3 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=14 rescued=0 ignored=0`; the exact-main run rebuilt the docs and changelog portals, published the generated static directories, revalidated the shared-edge certificate inputs, and completed all HTTP and HTTPS probe checks before finishing.

`curl -I https://example.com` returned `HTTP/2 308` redirecting to `https://nginx.example.com/`; `curl -I https://docs.example.com` and `curl -I https://ops.example.com` both returned `HTTP/2 302` to their `oauth2/sign_in` paths with `x-robots-tag: noindex, nofollow`; and `echo | openssl s_client -servername docs.example.com -connect docs.example.com:443 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -issuer -subject -text` showed a Let's Encrypt issuer (`CN=E7`), subject `CN=nginx.example.com`, and SAN coverage for `agents.example.com`, `api.example.com`, `apps.example.com`, `changelog.example.com`, `coolify.example.com`, `docs.example.com`, `draw.example.com`, `headscale.example.com`, `home.example.com`, `langfuse.example.com`, `logs.example.com`, `example.com`, `n8n.example.com`, `nginx.example.com`, `ops.example.com`, `realtime.example.com`, `registry.example.com`, `status.example.com`, `tasks.example.com`, and `wiki.example.com`.

`make subdomain-exposure-audit` wrote audit run `b24e6187-104c-4c0a-a65b-d723019b9d24` at `2026-03-29T12:49:00.258027Z` into `receipts/subdomain-exposure-audit/20260329T124900Z.json`; the ADR 0273 concordance checks passed on release `0.177.77`, while the audit still reported only the pre-existing `git.example.com` warnings `active_subdomain_missing_expected_public_resolution` and `active_catalog_subdomain_missing_from_zone`.

notes: This receipt supersedes the earlier branch-local receipt `2026-03-29-adr-0273-public-endpoint-admission-control-live-apply` as the canonical source for the merged mainline state because it records the synchronized replay from the protected release cut on top of the newest available origin/main baseline.

After origin/main advanced to `90c3b26f93fbfe6ffdaecd74fdc422cfcf10281f`, the exact-main route-ledger and shared-edge replays were rerun from release `0.177.77` and the final audit proof was refreshed at `receipts/subdomain-exposure-audit/20260329T124900Z.json`.

The route-ledger replay remained fully idempotent on the integrated tree, while the shared-edge replay made three safe changes on `nginx-lv3` while re-publishing the generated docs and changelog portals for release 0.177.77.

The live platform already satisfied ADR 0273's public-hostname and certificate concordance contract before this exact-main replay; platform version 0.130.52 records the synchronized mainline verification of that contract together with the protected release surfaces.
